ops.text: OpenAI codex quota is HARD-EXHAUSTED account-wide as of 2026-07-16 ~00:50Z: every codex-ask/codex exec call fails immediately with "You've hit your usage limit ... try again at Jul 22nd, 2026 8:37 AM" (verified twice with fresh questions and scratch dirs; REPLY_FILE 0 bytes, thread starts then turn.failed). The gpt-5.6-sol lane (implementation, finder/refuter review, security verification per the Models table) is down until that reset — route those lanes to opus-4.8/fable at same-or-higher effort instead, and don't burn time retrying: the block is plan-level, not a transient rate limit. Two implementation orders got through earlier the same evening, so the exhaustion is fresh; if this recurs, the account owner should check https://chatgpt.com/codex/settings/usage for whether concurrent sessions are draining the plan.
